Interface PayloadColumnResolver

All Known Implementing Classes:
VarcharPayloadColumnResolver
public interface PayloadColumnResolver
Strategy for resolving the SQL type and extracting the value of the PAYLOAD column.

Implement this interface to support payload column types other than the default VARCHAR (e.g. TEXT or CLOB).

Author:
Anand Manissery
See Also:
  • VarcharPayloadColumnResolver

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    String
    extractPayload(ResultSet resultSet, String payloadColumn)
    Extracts the payload value from the current row of the given result set.
    int
    payloadType()
    Returns the JDBC type constant for the payload column.

  • Method Details

    • payloadType

      int payloadType()
      Returns the JDBC type constant for the payload column.
      Returns:
      the JDBC type constant (see Types)

    • extractPayload

      String extractPayload(ResultSet resultSet, String payloadColumn) throws SQLException
      Extracts the payload value from the current row of the given result set.
      Parameters:
      resultSet - result set positioned on the current row
      payloadColumn - name of the payload column
      Returns:
      the payload value as a String, or null if the column is SQL NULL
      Throws:
      SQLException - if a database access error occurs
